title: Medical Remedies (Formerly Marbled's First Aid)
description: A mod that adds sorts of first aid items, pills, medicines, and syringes
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)

![mfa title](https://i.postimg.cc/tC5GHC0S/mfa-title.png)

Marbled's First Aid is a mod that adds sorts of first aid items, medicines, and syringes for Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.21.1, and NeoForge 1.21.4.

# Features

- First aid items: Medkit, Bandages, Bandaid, and Pain Pills.

- Medicine items: Morphine, Tonic, Eye Drops, Antidote, and Elixir.

- Syringe items: Morphine Syringe, Adrenaline Syringe, and Stimpack.

- Other items: Awkward Medicine Bottle/Syringe for brewing medicines and syringes.

# Usage

- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.

- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.

- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 


MarbledHubb Studios is proudly partnered with [BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth) When using our code "marbledhubb", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
